vi-√sphūrj (incorrectly -sphurj) P. -sphūrjati, to resound, thunder, roar,  BhP. ;
to snort,  MBh. ;
to break forth, appear,  Kāv.  :
Caus. -sphūrjayati, to cause to resound or twang (a bow),  BhP.
